title: lappula heteracantha subsp. heterocarpa
intro: Lappula heteracantha subsp. heterocarpa is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage family, and is native to parts of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Lappula heteracantha subsp. heterocarpa is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may also be used in ointments or salves to address skin issues.
